D Tide Wave 5 Max Difficulty Guide (for those who are stupid like me)
Run Goliath E2 (E2 is mandatory, he steals the bosses strength which we need for this strat) + Aurita (0 cost spam cards + optional hand mulligan) + Celeste (revive) + Faint (better margin of error for death resistance RNG + embryos to feed Aurita)
Equip the death resistance covenant set Whispers of the Burial Grounds to at least Celeste + Faint, feel free to throw on more, they do not need to be levelled, ideally with death res substats. 200% DR at start of battle is minimum unless your RNG is bad
Play by play: Fight boss as usual, enter defensive tentacle stance and survive until the boss applies hunting stance to one of your characters. If the boss applied it to Aurita it's much easier so consider hard resetting (quit the stage and reenter) if it's on someone else. Your goal is to eventually hit a critical mass of spamming out Auritas 0 cost to draw cards and boost the bosses strength gain, then on the following turn use Goliaths strength steal to gain massive amounts of strength to drop the boss down and nuke the boss with your now superboosted Aurita spam. The add in the back is irrelevant to the fight, I think killing it is actually detrimental to this strat but IDFK. At a certain point the boss will have 3-5k attack and stealing it will guarantee you knock it into 80% DR very quickly.
